page.title: FAQ | PERADA GROUP
page.description: Frequently asked questions about PERADA GROUP logistics, HR, API-U imports, and integrated business operations.
page.heroSubheadline: Find answers about logistics, human capital, and integrated business solutions from PERADA GROUP.

section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
section.intro: Quick answers about our services, partnership process, and operational coverage. Still have questions? Our team is ready to help.

items.question: What are PERADA GROUP's main services?
items.answer: PERADA GROUP offers two specializations in one group. Through PT Perkasa Adi Yuda, we provide Logistics & Freight Forwarding — including JPT, domestic & international shipping, and customs clearance. Through PT Perdana Adi Yuda, we offer Human Capital & Outsourcing, event & facility support, business consulting, and Import & Trading (API-U) as a licensed importer.

items.question: Can PT Perdana Adi Yuda help with importing goods?
items.answer: Yes. PT Perdana Adi Yuda is a licensed importer with a valid Importer Identification Number (API-U). We support imports of machinery, industrial equipment, electric automotive components, solar panels, and other goods in a legal, structured manner compliant with Indonesian trade regulations.

items.question: How does the partnership process work?
items.answer: It begins with a needs consultation via our contact form, email, or WhatsApp. Our team analyzes the service scope, prepares a proposal or quotation, and defines SLAs and execution mechanisms. Once agreed, services are delivered with structured coordination and periodic reporting tailored to corporate clients.

items.question: Are services available outside Greater Jakarta?
items.answer: Yes. PERADA GROUP serves corporate clients across Indonesia. For logistics and freight forwarding, coverage includes domestic and international shipments. For operational services such as HR outsourcing, events, and facility support, coverage is tailored to project location and client needs — our team will confirm details during the initial consultation.

items.question: What is the difference between PT Perkasa Adi Yuda and PT Perdana Adi Yuda?
items.answer: PT Perkasa Adi Yuda focuses on logistics and transportation management — handling shipments, customs documentation, and supply chain efficiency. PT Perdana Adi Yuda handles business operational support — HR, events, facility management, API-U imports, and business development consulting. Both operate under PERADA GROUP as one integrated partner.

items.question: Does PERADA GROUP serve corporate and industrial clients?
items.answer: Yes. PERADA GROUP has experience supporting corporate partners across sectors — from manufacturing, automotive, and telecommunications to heavy industry. We understand the compliance, scale, and service standards required by mid-to-large enterprises.

items.question: How can I request a quotation or consultation?
items.answer: Reach us via our contact page, email info@perada.co.id, or WhatsApp 0812-1414-4214. Describe your business needs — our consultants will respond within 1–2 business days.

items.question: Does the logistics service include customs clearance and documentation?
items.answer: Yes. Through PT Perkasa Adi Yuda, our logistics services include customs clearance, customs documentation, and regulatory compliance for export-import processes. Our team focuses on time efficiency, cost optimization, and regulatory compliance in every transportation arrangement.

items.question: Does HR outsourcing include recruitment and training?
items.answer: Yes. Through PT Perdana Adi Yuda, Human Capital & Outsourcing services can include recruitment, workforce placement, HR administration, training, and operational HR support tailored to corporate project needs. Scope is defined in the partnership proposal.

items.question: Are SLAs and periodic reporting available for corporate clients?
items.answer: Yes. For corporate clients, PERADA GROUP establishes mutually agreed Service Level Agreements (SLAs) — covering response targets, execution schedules, and periodic reporting mechanisms. Reports are tailored to the type of service, whether logistics or business operations.

items.question: What types of shipments and goods can you handle?
items.answer: PT Perkasa Adi Yuda handles domestic and international shipments — including general cargo, heavy equipment, industrial materials, and project cargo. Goods type, routes, and documentation requirements are confirmed during the initial consultation to ensure regulatory and operational compliance.

items.question: How are service fees structured and estimated?
items.answer: Fees are based on service scope, volume, location, and operational complexity. After an initial consultation, our team provides a transparent estimate or written quotation. For ongoing projects, partnership schemes are tailored to client needs and scale.
